TH_YUYUKO-YUYUKO_CHARACTER.cardsModifier: Yuyuko's cards now appear in rewards and shops.
TH_YUYUKO-YUYUKO_CHARACTER.description:
A seamless ghost, able to lure death without resistance,
and easily put enemies to their end.
TH_YUYUKO-YUYUKO_CHARACTER.eventDeathPre: ...No! There's still so much I haven't eaten...
TH_YUYUKO-YUYUKO_CHARACTER.goldMonologue: [sine]...With this money I can buy lots of food...[/sine]
TH_YUYUKO-YUYUKO_CHARACTER.title: Yuyuko Saigyouji
TH_YUYUKO-YUYUKO_CHARACTER.unlockText: Play a game with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
